reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text:
Very nice. Looks good, I like the gold edging more than I thought I would. A little small, but I barely notice. The mouse I WAS using was HUGE, and my entire palm rested on it. This one only covers ⅔ of my palm.

Very comfortable.

Have not played anything that could be considered a stress test. I like that you can turn it off, but I dislike that you have to remember to turn it off.

I cannot tell if it goes to sleep.

reviews.title: wireless mouse
reviews.text: My old wireless finally died - dropped too many times onto the hardwood floor.  I purchased one that was like the old one and this one.  This one is flatter.  I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text: This is a good value for the cost.  If you need something small and easy to carry around with you this is great. Especially right now I am between working from home but sometimes have to visit the office and the less and smaller items I carry, the better!  This is nice and slim and works great with my laptop.  I don't really like to use batteries but as long as you switch it off when not in use you will be able to get quite a bit of use out of one.

reviews.title: Loses Connection CONSTANTLY
reviews.text: I have to turn it off and on about 5x a day because it randomly loses connectivity. When I am using it or idle for less than 1 min.

reviews.title: Good So Far
reviews.text: Easy to install.  Nice color. Has on off switch with usb inside by battery.

reviews.title: Pretty good
reviews.text:
It's the best wireless mouse I have used so far, and the price was reasonable. It does have a tendency to skip around if the battery starts to get low of if it's not really close to my laptop. It does work, it fits nicely in my hand and it feels sturdy. I've had others that felt as if they would shatter if just dropped on the carpet.

Comfort - Great
Price - Fair
Battery life - Okay
Sturdiness - Good
Good product overall

- works

Cons

reviews.title: Nice mid sized mouse
reviews.text:
So far so good.
Easy to use and setup.
Fits my hand comfortably.
Just got it, will update if anything goes wrong.

reviews.title: ** Use tips ** Nice mouse....
reviews.text:
Nice mouse.... slightly large, and I have large hands. If you have small hands, I would purchase a size down.

It is simple to set up, works well (so far), and I like the wireless feature.

Tips:

My other mouse had a place to store the USB unit. This one also has a storage slot, which makes it convenient. Otherwise, you can leave the USB connector in the laptop (If it fits in your case with the device inserted...)

Be sure to turn off the device when not in use to conserve your batteries. (Sliding switch on bottom)

This mouse is Windows compatible. I run Windows 7.... works fine.

If you have a trackpad that drives you crazy, these devices are great!

Enjoy!

reviews.title: GREAT BUY!
reviews.text:
I had purchased an ergonomic mouse prior to this one. It was rechargeable as well and died less than an hour after lite use. It was not very comfortable and felt cheap. When i received this one I was skeptical because it did feel lite weight and I worried it would be cheap quality. It is comfortable & light weight, rechargeable long lasting charge. I use it for work it lasts all day and since I work from home I used it at night as well without needing a recharge until bed time. I have switched to regular mouse a couple times when i forgot to charge mine and there is a huge difference in comfort. I have a hand injury and when i use a regular mouse my hand hurts, after using this one I see a big difference when I have had to switch back. Highly recommend.

** update: i’ve now had this for several months and I have actually ordered another one which I haven’t had to take out of the box. I honestly ordered it because I lost the charging cord to my first one which I rarely use. I think I charge this mouse maybe once a week if that and I use it up to 15 hours a day with work and it never dies.

reviews.title: Love this mouse!
reviews.text: This is the 3rd one so I can have 2 at work in case I forget to charge it I have a backup and 1 at home.  The buttons aren't as quiet on this one and it's not that pretty shiny purple as pictured but if you're an Admin Asst like me you will love it! It took away my shoulder and wrist pain.

reviews.title: Great for carpal tunnel!
reviews.text: I bought this mouse for its ergonomically design. It is great for my carpal tunnel. Sleep mode is fantastic and it’s easy to charge, which it does quickly.

title: Neises LED Bluetooth Mouse,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Pro/MacBook Air/iMac/mac/ipad/ipad pro,Wireless Mouse for Macboook Air/MacBook Pro/PC (Silver)
description:
✅Packing list: Instructions*1, LED rechargeable Bluetooth5.1 + 2.4G dual-mode mouse *1, 2.4g Nano USB receiver *1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line *1, USB C-type adapter *1
✅How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:
Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse.
✅ How to connect to iOS/iPad/Pro/Air/ Mini/ Phone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse
first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.)
(1) open tabletSettings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）
(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)
🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse?
🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
✅ How to use the 2.4G receiver mode:
Open the 2.4G receiver mode at the bottom of the mouse, remove the USB receiver at the bottom of the mouse,Plug the USB receiver into your computer's USB port and move the mouse to start working，If your laptop is a Type C port, first plug the Type C adapter into your laptop's Type C port, then plug the mouse's USB receiver into the Type C adapter, and then move the mouse to work
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
features: ERGONOMIC DESIGN： Good surface coating technology given you a skin-like touch feeling. User-friendly design provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and pocket-sized perfect for travel, Mute design keeps away annoying clicks.

Use the DPI mouse button on the screen: you are free to adjust the mouse sensitivity to match your activity. Provide 3 DPI levels (800-1200-1600). The higher the DPI, the faster the cursor moves on the screen
For all computers and laptops and ios13 / ios14 tablet/pro/Air / Phone / MAC / MacBook / Pro / air windows / chromebook / HP / Dell
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
BUILT-IN BATTERY: Built-in battery,easy to charge by micro usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.

reviews.title: Cool looking but not the best mouse
reviews.text:
I wanted a cool looking mouse to replace a Microsoft mouse that was starting to act funny, after 5 + years. After using it for an hour now I really wish I would have spent more for functionality rather than aesthetic value.

First of all I had to pull out a sheet of paper to use as a mouse pad because my old Microsoft mouse functioned with any surface that I used it on, performed flawlessly. This new mouse can't even be used on a standard wooden desk without skipping and jumping all over the screen.

I prepared myself mentally for a cheap feeling mouse because in the end you get what you pay for but holy cow this mouse feels like something I would buy at the local dollar store it screams lack of quality.

I am sure I will be buying another mouse to replace this one shortly either from frustration or because it was built at such a low quality standard.

reviews.text: Leadsail is my go to brand for quality computer mice.  This is the fifth one I have gotten and they all work flawlessly. I have rather large hands and this mouse is perfect to grip and maneuver.  It also is indeed silent which is not really an issue for me.  What I look for is design, function and durability and you get that with all Leadsail products.  Recommend.

reviews.title: Excellent Keyboard!
reviews.text: This was a Christmas gift for my daughter and she absolutely loves everything about this keyboard. Thank you

reviews.title: Keyboard is very loud when typing!
reviews.text: The mouse is pretty standard, nothing great, but nothing bad. I brought my cute little set to work in my laptop bag so I figured it was secure. When I took the keyboard out 1 letter had popped off. No biggie, it snapped back on easily. The keyboard buttons are bit higher than I'm used to so I was typing slower and it was a bit uncomfortable after a while. I planned on switching back to my regular keyboard shortly but what escalated that switch was how loud the keyboard was while I was typing. My office is usually rather quiet plus I'm in a cubicle and a coworker asked what are you doing over there!?! He said it sounded like I was hammering the letters with a small hammer. I knew it was loud but after realizing it was bothering my coworkers I immediately put it in my bag to bring home. Haven't used it since!

reviews.title: Nice keyboard and mouse set
reviews.text: This is a great mouse and keyboard set, feels like typing on an old typewriter but more comfortable. I like the combined usb. Looks very nice, comfortable to use,

reviews.title: Amusing
reviews.text: I really like this set. They both match perfectly. The keyboard is comfortable and all the buttons work perfectly. I like the round buttons they are pretty cool. Connects easy enough. Just wish it was rechargeable.

reviews.title: Plug and Play Wireless Keyboard; Not sure about the mouse
reviews.text: I run Windows 10 on my laptop, and this wireless keyboard was up and running in few minutes after unpackaging.  You will need to provide your own batteries (2 AA – one for the mouse and one for the keyboard).  The keys are not tactile like other “typewriter” keyboard I have, but the keys have enough tension in the loaded spring to give a slight “satisfactory” feel to the keystrokes.  The wireless connection between the receiver and the keyboard/mouse was responsive and experienced no noticeable delay.  I am not 100% sold on the “milk tea” colored keyboard, but it slowly grew on me after a few days of use, although my 8-year young daughter thought it was like a puke color… an interesting observation.  The mouse was not for me.  It was too flat and too small for my hand, and after a few hours of cumbersome use, I switched back to my existing mouse pad.  For less than $49 USD, I think this keyboard brings a fun look to the otherwise a boring office environment.

reviews.title: Hey it works great HIGHLY RECOMMEND

It works does random motion immediately recognized by my dell laptop workstation
I’m not monitored by my boss so can’t give insight to that consideration. IT KEEPS MY SCREEN open so I don’t have to keep logging in
Wish the jiggle button had a light to tell it’s active HOWEVER perhaps this is a good thing (it immediately jiggles so I know it’s working) no light no one knows around me it’s on

reviews.title: Great Wireless Mouse and Jiggler
reviews.text: This mouse is the perfect size and weight, moves well and clicks quietly. I love the jigglier functionality; you just press the button built into the mouse and it keep the mouse cursor moving on the screen. It keeps my window open and Office teams active. I should have gotten a mouse like this long ago; it allows you additional freedom at work when you need to be away from your desk for a while. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Very good idea
reviews.text: Very good idea to have this jiggler built in, other similar products need to have an additional equipment, and put mouse on it for moving, not as convenient as this one. But sometimes this product is not stable, after a couple of hours working, I found the mouse stopped moving, I checked and found the battery light was off due to unknown reason, and after I reset the battery, the mouse moved again, and such kinds of issue happened several times. Therefore, I can only gave 4 stars review. But anyway I like this cute tool.

reviews.title: Keep screensavers from activating or keep from being logged off for no activity!
reviews.text:
A very handy, take it with you mouse that will keep pretty much anything from timing out due to lack of activity. When you need to step away for a few minutes and not have anything you are working on, just press the button on top to activate the jiggler and keep the mouse pointer gently moving.
I have only had this for a week or so and it has already proved it's worth. When my screen saver kicks off any process I have running slows way down. When I am rendering media this is a major pain, or I should say "used to be a major pain".
The dongle for USB connectivity stores in the mouse itself so you can carry the mouse and never have to worry about losing the dongle. It also has an on/off switch to save battery life.
A nice piece of gear, I suggest this for anyone that doesn't want to time out again.

reviews.title: Quiet and Functional
reviews.text:
I have been searching for a product like this for a long time! I work remotely most days and have to rely on connecting through a VPN connection. The connection automatically disconnects after a certain time frame, so this jiggler function is great! I can click the button to activate and leave the computer.
The setup on this mouse is so simple. I plugged in the USB and the mouse worked right away.
My favorite feature that was unexpected was how quiet the mouse is. I wasn’t use to not being able to hear a click. Such a nice product!

title: Uiosmuph LED Wireless Mouse, G12 Slim Rechargeable Wireless Silent Mouse, 2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Purple)
features: Rechargeable: Built-in rechargeable battery, no need change battery. Special soundless design for the right and left buttons, won’t disturb others.
Colorful Light: 7 different color changes randomly while in use, offering soothing lighting, creating cool and fancy atmosphere for work and play.
Energy Saving: The mouse will be in sleep mode in 8 mins of inactivity. And the LED light can be turned off by the bottom light switch.
Slim & Portable: About 4.4 x 2.2 x 0.79 inches, Perfect for travelling carry and it can be easily put into your laptop bag and ultra-space saving.
Widely Compatibility: Works with Windows 2000/XP/7/8/10/Vista, Mac with USB port or Type C port. Suitable for homes, offices, travel and more.

reviews.title: Great battery life
reviews.text: I'm still not fully decided about how I feel about this mouse. But, I can talk about what I know so far. The packaging I got the mouse and was really nice, really simple, but easy to open. The mouse was easy to set up, and the RGB looks pretty cool. There is a really cool DPI changer function that makes gaming much easier, however, I can't recommend this mouse for gaming because the ergonomics are pretty trash. I have to cramp my hand like a claw over the top of the mouse and after long periods of use it does start hurting. The surface is also pretty slippery, so I found that my hand slips on the mouse all the time. The tracking however, is great! And I would have to say that biggest plus is the battery life. I got this about 2 weeks ago, charged it once, and it is yet to die! I think the features of this mouse are great, but I would not recommend it. Purely because of the ergonomics, if you are going to use this mouse often, then you probably should go if something more ergonomic.

reviews.title: Poor performance | no charge indicator
reviews.text: Highly susceptible to interference. Drags and lags.

reviews.title: Meh
reviews.text: I like the size and the LED colors.  The battery life is a little lackluster and it actually starts acting up when it's "tired".  I got it for my iPad but haven't used it a month or so b/c I got tired of her attitude.

reviews.title: Had 2 of these and they both died
reviews.text: Will never buy from this company again... the second one we bought froze and would not work again.. same as the first one.

reviews.title: Basic but functions well
reviews.text: I ordered a ‘LED Wireless Mouse, Uiosmuph G12 Slim Rechargeable Wireless Silent Mouse, 2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Silver)’ for review.  For the price point, this is a basic mouse.  The rotating light strip is a cool looking feature.  It is sleek in design.  It connected well with the dongle to my Surface Pro.  It glides well over a mouse pad.  It is rechargeable, which I prefer to battery operated.  The click of this mouse is quiet. The dongle slides into the bottom and of course it has already been lost.  I prefer the dongle to be stored in a closed compartment on a mouse.  It does not require recharging for several days of moderate use and seems to charge quickly.  Overall, for basic use, this mouse works well.

reviews.title: Good find!
reviews.text: I got this to keep in my work bag as a backup/when I work from home. I will say the first impression wasn't stellar. The top plastic has a cheap look/feel to it. But it also makes up in some nice touches. For example, the USB fob. I was apprehensive about the keep slot for it because there wasn't something that made it feel or look actually secured. But turns out, there's magnetic component so it gets sucked in rather than loosely placed. Battery power seems as advertised. I haven't charged mine in about a month and it's still going. Ergonomics is about what you'd expect based on the photos.

reviews.title: No more Batteries
reviews.text: Love my new mouse! Old one I would turn off and on all the time to save battery. This one I keep wanting to then remember it goes to sleep and no more batteries. First charge went fast, haven't had to charge it since. Love the self storing dongle. Should have purchased this long time ago.

reviews.text:
Extremely slow unless you know how to disable 50 or so features that run off the bat. The mouse came with no bluetooth adapter, and this doesn't have built in bluetooth.
Seriously don't buy HP.

1 hour of ownership update: It's stopped opening windows. It brings up the login screen, then I get a black screen. The computer no longer works and I've done nothing to it. There are several other reviews referring to this issue.

reviews.title: Five Stars

reviews.title: Excelent value laptop
reviews.text: My daughter needed a faster more copact laptop for her graphics software so we gave this one a try.  Very fast, easy setup...nice and easy to chuck the bloatware.  A reasonable price made it an easy choice...so much so that we purchased another.

reviews.title: Definitely returning and buying a different brand
reviews.text: I had high hopes for this laptop... very very very slow. I mean how can a company like HP in this day in age make a laptop this slow. I didn’t expect speeds you would see in a gaming laptop for this price but I at least want to be able to watch a movie or even start the laptop within 10 minutes, and they don’t even allow you to upgrade the RAM or anything from what I can tell... and the battery life is laughable, like a previous comment said, about 1 percent per minute. I would even go as far as to say that it dies faster than that. Purchased this for my sister for her birthday but will definitely return and go with a different laptop.

reviews.title: Amazing addition to the Logitech G Pro Wireless!
reviews.text: Great quality, precision cut pieces that fit EXACTLY in the shape of the mouse. Whoever designed the CAD for this did a great job on the measurements. Using the grip itself, also crazy how something so small makes a big difference. No more worrying about it slipping off my right thumb which I mentally couldn't handle. It's shame that Logitech didn't design the grip but this will do nicely until they do.

reviews.title: They're ok.
reviews.text:
I'm only using the side grips. (No issue with the texture of the buttons, so imo, its best to just not use them and keep the mouse as light as possible)

Its definitely an improvement over the stock plastic feel, which is too smooth for me. These add some grip, and even a bit of cushion.

Guess I was expecting a more grippy feeling. Maybe a more pronounced texture. There is definitely room for improvement for those of us with sweaty gaming hands.

I also wish the edges were tapered off at its edges rather than a hard cut, but that's a minor nitpick and not too important.

I will say with these grips, I am having trouble deciding between which mouse to use primarily... G Pro Wireless or Viper Ultimate. This is definitely something that was missing from the G Pro Wireless's design for me.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Was expecting more of a Dbrand style sticker, but this is even better. It's super rubbery and grippy. Don't ever plan on missing a shot when you play with this!

Just plug in the little USB port wireless device that is included and the mouse already seemed to be at least partially charged so away I went immediately without issue. It comes with some very nice colors that are changeable with a push button on the bottom. I like the moving multiple colors myself. Very nice unit for the price.

title: TECKNET Bluetooth Wireless Mouse, 3200 DPI Computer Mouse, 24-Month Battery Life and 6 Adjustable DPI Levels, 6 Buttons Compatible with Ipad Pro/Laptop/Surface Pro/Windows Computer/Chromebook-Red
features: 6 DPI and 6 Buttons: TECKNET bluetooth mouse has 3200/2400/2000/1600/1200/800DPI. Six efficient buttons and five adjustable DPI level that allow you to freely control the mouse speed. Connects directly to Bluetooth-enabled device laptop computer or PC without the need for a receiver.

TruWave technology. the accuracy of TruWave means you'll enjoy smoother tracking on almost any surface. With its wireless Bluetooth connection and TruWave technology, it works almost anywhere, from a café to a park bench. You can even use the TECKNET Bluetooth mouse on smooth material surfaces.

Ergonomic Design: The ergonomic design and soft rubber grip perfect to fit your hand for a comfortable grip while reducing wrist fatigue caused by long working hours. The compact size makes it easy to take with you whether you use your computer at home, at work or anywhere else.

Comfortable and Durable: TECKNET computer mice is made of skin-friendly, super durable wireless mouse with perfect performance on 10,000,000 clicks keystroke test! If you have problems with product, please contact us to solve it for you.
Long Battery Life: TECKNET bluetooth mouse can up to 24-month battery Life. It takes only 2 AA battery but NOT INCLUDED.

Wide Compatibility: TECKNET mouse compatible with Windows (2000, 2003, XP, VISTA, Win7, Win8, Win8.1, Win 10, Win 11, etc)Suitable for desktop, laptop, PC, MacBook, Chromebook and other devices. (Please note: The side buttons DO NOT work for Mac OS devices due to compatibility issues. Other Buttons function normally)
36 MONTHS SUPPORT: If you encounter any problems in using the product, please feel free to contact our professional customer service team, enjoying TECKNET 36 Months Warranty (Registered Only)
